candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label; matches total sales/revenue concept directly.
Also a top-line revenue label, but 'Total Revenue' is the more comprehensive preferred label when both are present and identical.

variables.notes: Both labels are present and numerically identical in the preview; using them as a priority list per the revenue rule.
Candidate list was empty, but the Income Statement contains the exact COGS label 'Costs of goods sold'. Selected from the full A-column preview as allowed.

No SG&A candidates were provided and there is no explicit SG&A line such as 'Selling, General & Admin' or 'Administrative expenses'. 'Employee benefit expenses' is the clearest overhead component visible. 'Other operating income and expenses' was excluded because it is mixed income/expense and not a clean SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Contains R&D wording, but it is amortization rather than current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related, but explicitly amortization of capitalized amounts and supplemental, not current R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset rollforward item, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing item, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear income-statement R&D expense line exists. The available R&D-related rows are amortization or balance-sheet asset lines, which should not be mapped to XRD.

candidates.why: Most direct match to interest expense.
Broader finance-cost line that can serve as fallback when explicit interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but too narrow/specific to represent total interest expense.
Finance-related but not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and too narrow to represent total interest expense.

variables.notes: Using a priority list: prefer explicit 'Interest Expenses'; fall back to broader 'Financial expenses' where needed.

candidates.why: Equity total, but includes non-controlling interests and would risk double counting if MIB is also mapped separately.
Balancing row, not an equity concept to map.
Statement total, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Provided BE candidates miss the preferred owner/parent-equity line. To avoid double counting with MIB, selected 'Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders' from the full A-column preview instead of 'Total Equity'. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, but MIB should preferably come from the balance sheet.
OCI/comprehensive-income attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred mapping for MIB.
Alternative balance-sheet label for the same concept; suitable fallback.
Income statement total attribution line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet minority-interest labels as a priority list; avoids mixing in income-statement attribution rows.
